input.company_description: Education services company providing Title I compliance consulting and intervention program design for K-12 school districts. 15 employees, fully remote. Works with about 40 districts across 3 states. Revenue under $2M. Founder-led with no dedicated sales function.

pain_points: no dedicated sales function to grow beyond 40 districts
founder doing everything from delivery to business development
revenue under $2M limits budget for any meaningful marketing spend
expected_output.reasoning: Tiny founder-led consultancy selling to school districts. No budget for outbound, no sales team to hand leads to, and government procurement cycles make cold outreach ineffective.
